publishedAbstract: You need to monitor OCS3 device usage and bricks because you can't create or expand a volume while you don't have 3 OCS devices with free space:_When creating a Heketi volume with only two nodes the replica is set to the default value of 3 (replica 3), an error "No space" is displayed by Heketi as there is no space to create a replica set of 3 disks on 3 different nodes._ [OCS3- creating persistent volumes](https://access.redhat.com/documentation/en-us/red_hat_openshift_container_storage/3.11/html/operations_guide/chap-documentation-red_hat_gluster_storage_container_native_with_openshift_platform-openshift_creating_persistent_volumes#File_Storage)
publishedTitle: Monitoring free space on OCS3 - preventing devices and bricks to get full.
